summary: First iteration end-to-end testing of SERENDIPITY salon site. Backend (11 pytest cases) all passing. Full booking E2E + theme toggle + gallery lightbox + contact form + WhatsApp + mobile menu all working through real preview URL.

issues: Console a11y warning: DialogContent in gallery-lightbox is missing a DialogTitle and aria-describedby. Wrap a hidden DialogTitle (e.g., VisuallyHidden) inside DialogContent to satisfy Radix a11y. Functionality is unaffected.

action_items: Optional: add a hidden DialogTitle (and DialogDescription/aria-describedby) inside Gallery lightbox DialogContent to remove Radix a11y warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend code is clean: uses uuid for IDs, excludes Mongo _id in projections, validates service_id/stylist_id/time, returns 409 on conflict — matches expected contract.

Frontend Booking uses date.toISOString().slice(0,10) which can shift the date by a day in negative-UTC locales (off-by-one). Consider using local YYYY-MM-DD formatting (e.g., `${y}-${m}-${d}`) to avoid timezone-related booking errors for users west of UTC.

Date.now()-based loader is hidden via opacity but stays in the DOM (offsetParent=null when opacity 0). Acceptable, but adding `pointer-events:none` once hidden is safer to avoid future overlay issues.
Gallery lightbox missing DialogTitle (Radix a11y) — minor a11y debt.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed bookings on far-future dates (2027-XX-15) and a TEST_ contact message; no production data altered.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_serendipity_backend.py covers: catalogs (services/stylists/gallery/testimonials), availability format, booking CRUD with persistence verification, 409 conflict, 400 validation (service/stylist/time), and contact creation. Run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. Frontend: full booking E2E confirmed (confirmation card with code shown). Note timezone caveat in Booking.jsx isoString slicing.
rca of the issue: No bugs identified. Only an accessibility console warning from Radix Dialog used in Gallery lightbox (non-functional).
